title: Alex Modpack
description: An all-inclusive client-side vanilla plus / optimization / beautification modpack!
body:
Have you ever wanted an upgraded Minecraft experience? Why don't you try out Alex's modpack, a pack like many others, only this one was made with love. A perfectly balanced combination of client-side optimization and QOL mods, as well as a little extra flavour via light resource packs and shaders. Perfect for a survival world with friends!

Some highlights include:
- Custom animations from Fresh Animations and Not Enough Animations
- Sound effects overhaul from Sound Physics Remastered and Presence Footsteps
- Context-dependent textures from Beautiful Potions and Enchanted Books: Recovered
- Navigational maps from Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's World Map
- World-changing beautification from Complementary Shaders and Distant Horizons
- World-altering beautification from Visuality and Particular Reforged
- Quality of life additions from Inventory Profiles Next and BetterF3
- and so much more!
